Clarity is immediate: old vs. new times are shown side-by-side, deadlines are bolded, and action items are unmistakable. Language is plain and appropriate for the audience—no corporate bloat. Structure is textbook: what's changing → key details → support → action required → empathetic close, all with scannable headers. Specificity is outstanding (exact dates, times, 2.5x rate, 40% volume increase, Oct 25 deadline, Jan 6 return). The human touches—acknowledging family disruption, offering meals and counseling, tying effort to year-end bonuses—feel genuine rather than performative. Docked slightly on brevity only because the closing paragraph could be one sentence tighter, but nothing is truly superfluous."}

rationale: Exceptionally well-crafted memo. Clarity is immediate: old vs. new times are shown side-by-side, deadlines are bolded, and action items are unmistakable. Language is plain and appropriate for the audience—no corporate bloat. Structure is textbook: what's changing → key details → support → action required → empathetic close, all with scannable headers. Specificity is outstanding (exact dates, times, 2.5x rate, 40% volume increase, Oct 25 deadline, Jan 6 return). The human touches—acknowledging family disruption, offering meals and counseling, tying effort to year-end bonuses—feel genuine rather than performative. Docked slightly on brevity only because the closing paragraph could be one sentence tighter, but nothing is truly superfluous.
